_comment: Delivery checklist tasks seeded per-client. Status values: pending | in-progress | complete

tasks.task: Send welcome email to stakeholders
Send project Welcome Pack
Confirm primary contacts and escalation paths
Request admin access to Microsoft 365 tenant
Request at least one test user account (required in Foundations & Jumpstart)
Confirm access to list of required repositories (SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams, Dropbox)
Review SharePoint/Dropbox structure and content locations
Review OneDrive accounts for business-critical files
Review Teams file stores and channel structures
Review shared/migrated drives for alignment and redundancy
Identify folder structure issues, duplication, conflicts, missing metadata
Identify sensitive/regulated data incorrectly stored
Assess Dropbox suitability, risk, compliance alignment (per SOW)
Identify direct vs group-based access issues
Identify external sharing risks and former employee access
Identify public/private site misconfiguration and inconsistent folder-level permissions
Compile AI-related governance, compliance, and data-protection risks
Build prioritised remediation actions list (Risk & Remediation Document — Excel)
Microsoft 365 AI Readiness Assessment Summary (PDF)
Risk & Remediation Document (Excel)
Define folder and site standards, naming conventions, retention and lifecycle rules
Define access governance rules and data ownership model
Align governance to PV and regulatory requirements (per SOW)
Create AI usage principles aligned to PV compliance and UK government AI policy
Define role-based responsibilities and human-review requirements for AI usage
Produce Do and Do Not operational guardrails for AI usage in PV context
Define escalation paths for unsafe or incomplete AI outputs
AI Governance Framework (PDF)
Responsible Use Policy and Staff Handbook (PDF)
Confirm Copilot licence status for all in-scope users
Confirm Foundations outputs completed (structure, permissions, governance)
Build Readiness and Control Matrix (Excel) aligned to Foundations outputs
Confirm which areas must be excluded or restricted for go-live
Go-Live Readiness Summary (PDF) with prerequisites and dependency map
Document final Copilot user scope (users, groups, workloads)
Validate admin configuration, SharePoint indexing and environment structure
Apply content exclusions and restrictions from D3 findings
Define connector scope and permitted repositories (Dropbox)
Configure authentication, consent and permissions model
Run agreed connector tests (retrieval works, restricted content remains restricted)
Log issues in Connector Issue and Remediation Tracker (Excel)
Copilot Enablement Record (PDF)
Connector Enablement and Configuration Record (PDF)
Connector Test Plan and Evidence Pack (PDF)
Connector Issue and Remediation Tracker (Excel)
Confirm training cohorts (roles, departments, PV duties)
Tailor training scenarios using real client data
Deliver two 2-hour instructor-led training sessions
Cover safe use, prompting, guardrails and client-specific examples
Participant Handbook (PDF) with exercises and scenarios
Training Completion Summary (PDF)
Identify regulatory and PV tasks per role
Build structured prompt sets for daily tasks, summaries, drafting and analysis
Add warnings, human-review rules and escalation points to prompts
Publish prompt library inside Copilot and mirror in client repository
Role-Based Prompt Library (Copilot and repository)
Copilot Usage Playbook (PDF)
Gather Copilot usage metrics and stakeholder feedback
Identify usage patterns, misuse risks, adoption challenges and quick wins
Propose improvements, additional prompts, governance adjustments and training refreshers
Adoption and Performance Review Report (PDF)
Phase 2 Roadmap (Excel or PDF)
